provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against claude. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
Test-driven development grew out of Kent Beck's work on Extreme Programming in the late 1990s, when he rediscovered older test-before-code practices and codified them in 'Test-Driven Development: By Example'.
From there TDD spread through the agile community, becoming a staple of XP practice and later a mainstream engineering habit far beyond its origins.
